zh.Zhytkavichy, Gomel Oblast, Belarus: 白俄羅斯Гомельская вобласць日特卡維其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Georgiewna Duchess of Turow於1148年出生在白俄羅斯Гомельская вобласць日特卡維其時，她的父親Iurii Iaroslavich39歲，母親Agatha Vsevelodkovna Gorodenskaja39歲。她和Ryurik Ii Rostisalvich Grand Duke Of Kiev至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1211年4月19日在Российская империяКиевская губерния享年63歲。

zh-hans.Zhytkavichy, Gomel Oblast, Belarus: 白俄罗斯Гомельская вобласць日特卡維其
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Georgiewna Duchess of Turow于1148年出生在白俄罗斯Гомельская вобласць日特卡維其时，她的父亲Iurii Iaroslavich39岁，母亲Agatha Vsevelodkovna Gorodenskaja39岁。她和Ryurik Ii Rostisalvich Grand Duke Of Kiev至少有2个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1211年4月19日在Российская империяКиевская губерния享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.description: "Armies of Prince Andrey Bogolyubskiy of Vladimir-Suzdal' sack Kiev. Andrey assumes title ""Grand Prince of Kiev and all Rus'""but chooses to reside in Suzdal'."

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Georgiewna Duchess of Turow was born in 1148, in Zhytkavichy, Gomel Oblast, Belarus, her father, Iurii Iaroslavich, was 39 and her mother, Agatha Vsevelodkovna Gorodenskaja, was 39. She had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Ryurik Ii Rostisalvich Grand Duke Of Kiev. She died on 19 April 1211, in Kiev, Russian Empire, at the age of 63.

Snovsk, Chernihivsʹka Oblastʹ, Ukraina, Nõukogude Liit

Snovsk, Chernihivsʹka Oblastʹ, Ukraine, Union soviétique
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Georgiewna Duchess of Turow est née en 1148, à Zhytkavichy, Gomel Oblast, Biélorussie, son père, Iurii Iaroslavich, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Agatha Vsevelodkovna Gorodenskaja, avait 39 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Ryurik Ii Rostisalvich Grand Duke Of Kiev. Elle est décédée le 19 avril 1211, à Kiev, Empire russe, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Georgiewna Duchess of Turow 1148 in Zhytkavichy, Gomel Oblast, Belarus geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Iurii Iaroslavich 39 und ihre Mutter Agatha Vsevelodkovna Gorodenskaja 39. Sie hatte mit Ryurik Ii Rostisalvich Grand Duke Of Kiev mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. April 1211 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Georgiewna Duchess of Turow è nata il nel 1148 nel Zhytkavichy, Gomel Oblast, Bielorussia, sua padre, Iurii Iaroslavich, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Agatha Vsevelodkovna Gorodenskaja, aveva 39 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Ryurik Ii Rostisalvich Grand Duke Of Kiev. Morì il 19 aprile 1211, nel Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Georgiewna Duchess of Turowが1148年にベラルーシГомельская вобласцьズhイトカヴィチイで生まれた時，父Iurii Iaroslavichは39歳，母Agatha Vsevelodkovna Gorodenskajaは39歳であった。彼女はRyurik Ii Rostisalvich Grand Duke Of Kievとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1211年4月19日にРоссийская империяКиевская губернияで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Georgiewna Duchess of Turow(이)가 1148년 벨라루스 Гомельская вобласць 즈히트카비c히에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Iurii Iaroslavich(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agatha Vsevelodkovna Gorodenskaja(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 Ryurik Ii Rostisalvich Grand Duke Of Kiev(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1211년 4월 19일 Российская империя Киевская губерния에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Georgiewna Duchess of Turow nasceu em 1148, em Zhytkavichy, Gomel Oblast, Belarus, seu pai, Iurii Iaroslavich, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Agatha Vsevelodkovna Gorodenskaja, tinha 39 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Ryurik Ii Rostisalvich Grand Duke Of Kiev. Ela faleceu em 19 de abril de 1211, em Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Georgiewna Duchess of Turow родилась в 1148 г. в местности житкавичи, Гомельская область, Беларусь, её отцу по имени Iurii Iaroslavich было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Agatha Vsevelodkovna Gorodenskaja, 39. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Ryurik Ii Rostisalvich Grand Duke Of Kiev. Она умерла 19 апреля 1211 г. в местности Киевская губерния, Российская империя в возрасте 63 лет.

Snovsk, Chernihivsʹka Oblastʹ, Ucrania, Unión Soviética
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Georgiewna Duchess of Turow nació en 1148, en Zhytkavichy, Gomel Oblast, Bielorrusia, su papá, Iurii Iaroslavich, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Agatha Vsevelodkovna Gorodenskaja, tenía 39 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con Ryurik Ii Rostisalvich Grand Duke Of Kiev. Murió el 19 de abril de 1211, en Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich, a la edad de 63 años.
